name: uix-monorepo
description: UIx v2 — private workspace root. Publishable packages live in packages/* (@uix/tokens, @uix/react). Source of the --uix-* contract (ADR-0016).

scripts.build:react: cd packages/react && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:react
scripts.test:api: api-extractor run --config packages/react/api-extractor.json && api-extractor run --config packages/react/api-extractor.chart.json
scripts.test:api:update: api-extractor run --local --config packages/react/api-extractor.json && api-extractor run --local --config packages/react/api-extractor.chart.json
